dev.jeka.core.api.tooling.maven

Class JkMvn

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.system.JkAbstractProcess<JkMvn>
      • dev.jeka.core.api.tooling.maven.JkMvn
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Runnable

    public final class JkMvn
extends JkAbstractProcess<JkMvn>
    Convenient class wrapping maven process.
